scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run apk
scripts.cap:apk:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run apk:release
scripts.apk: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
